steps.title: Read the slope of line t
steps.content:
The equation is already in slope-intercept form. In
$$y=-\frac{1}{3}x+15$$
the slope of line $t$ is $-\frac{1}{3}$.

steps.title: Take the negative reciprocal
steps.content:
Perpendicular lines have slopes whose product is $-1$. Therefore, the slope of line $s$ is
$$-\frac{1}{-1/3}=3$$
The answer is B.
